core_principles: Clean, clinical, and modern - not corporate generic.
Trust-first: Highlight credentials, reviews, and 24/7 availability.
Card-based layouts with soft, diffuse shadows to lift content above the background.
Clear visual hierarchy: Primary actions (Book Appointment) in Trust Blue, Emergency actions in Emergency Red.

primary.description: Trust Blue - Used for main primary buttons (Book Appointment), major headings, active states.

secondary.description: Health Teal - Used for secondary actions, health indicators, icons, checkmarks, trust badges.

accent.description: Emergency Red - ONLY for emergency CTAs, 24/7 badges, ambulance, critical alerts.

background.description: Backgrounds - F7FAFF for app background, pure white for cards and elevated surfaces.

text.description: Text colors - High contrast dark navy/black for readability.

rules: Never center text by default. Left-align for clinical precision unless it's a hero or specific metric.
Use Roboto Mono for any medical data, phone numbers, statistics, or metrics.

grid_modes.specialities: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for large cards, rounded-xl for buttons/inputs, rounded-3xl for image containers.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary-hover shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 transition-all active:scale-95 px-8 py-4 rounded-xl font-semibold
buttons.emergency: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-accent-hover shadow-lg shadow-accent/20 transition-all active:scale-95 px-8 py-4 rounded-xl font-bold animate-pulse-slow
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary-hover transition-all active:scale-95 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary-light transition-all px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-medium

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-border/50 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border/50 shadow-sm

images.strategy: Real hospital interior/exterior shots. Doctors in white coats with diverse Indian patients. No cheesy stock.

hero_background.placement: Home page hero background (needs strong white or primary color overlay/gradient for text readability)

doctor_patient_1.placement: About Us or Why Choose Us section

female_doctor.placement: Doctors directory header or individual doctor profile

hospital_exterior.placement: Contact page or About page building showcase

ambulance.placement: Emergency banner background or Emergency services card

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all icons. Ensure stroke-width is consistent (usually 2). Use Health Teal (#00B4A6) for positive/health icons, Trust Blue (#0A6ABF) for structural icons, Emergency Red (#E84040) for urgent/emergency icons.

motion.page_transitions: Subtle fade in and slide up.
motion.hover_effects: Cards lift up (-translate-y-1) and shadows expand. Buttons scale down slightly on active (active:scale-95).
motion.scrolling: Smooth scroll enabled for anchor links.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on Primary (#0A6ABF) and Accent (#E84040) meets WCAG standards. Check contrast for Secondary (#00B4A6) with white text, if it fails, use it as a background for dark text or use as an icon/border color.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='book-appointment-btn', data-testid='emergency-call-btn').

specific_instructions.hero_section: Hero must feature headline 'Comprehensive Care, Around the Clock — JP Nagar's Trusted Multispeciality Hospital'. Include a Trust Strip below it (4.5★ Google, 24/7 Open, 20+ Specialities, Ambulance).
specific_instructions.emergency_banner: Must be highly visible. Background Emergency Red. Include '080 6958 9900' formatted with Roboto Mono font. Add click-to-call functionality.
specific_instructions.appointments_flow: Multi-step form using Shadcn components. Steps: 1. Department 2. Doctor 3. Date/Time 4. Patient Details.
specific_instructions.admin_dashboard: Use 'Control Room' grid layout for the admin dashboard. High data density, sharp tables, Shadcn charts. Distinct from the marketing pages.
specific_instructions.whatsapp_cta: Floating button in bottom right corner using brand green/teal or WhatsApp's native color, persistent across all pages.
